ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the stock is listed */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "last_split_date" TEXT /* The date of the last stock split */,
  "last_dividend_date" TEXT /* The date of the last dividend payment */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* The official website of the company */,
  "company_ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock (accounting for splits and dividends) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* The pre-market price of the stock */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* The post-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price of the stock for the day */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* The source of the price data (e.g., API, exchange feed) */,
  "price_reliability" TEXT /* A measure of the reliability of the price data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_avatar" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's address */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* The date the user last changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* The type of portfolio (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "portfolio_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_strategy" TEXT /* The investment strategy used for the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* The current value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock association */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchased_at" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* The price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* The current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was last updated */,
  "watchlist_type" TEXT /* The type of watchlist (e.g., short-term watch, long-term watch) */,
  "watchlist_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_strategy" TEXT /* The strategy used for the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock association */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., earnings report, dividend payout, merger) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the market (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* The source of the event information (e.g., news article, press release) */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL to the event source */,
  "event_impact_score" INTEGER /* A numerical score indicating the impact of the event (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_events" (
  "stock_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the stock (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "event_impact_score" INTEGER /* A numerical score indicating the impact of the event on the stock (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_events_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES market_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the indicator is updated (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., dollars, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "article_author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "article_category" TEXT /* The category of the news article (e.g., earnings, market trends) */,
  "article_sentiment" TEXT /* The sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "stock_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock news association */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the news to the stock (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "news_impact_score" INTEGER /* A numerical score indicating the impact of the news on the stock (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news_feeds ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the data change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the action performed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* The old value of the record before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value of the record after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature or module accessed by the user */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* The device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or feature of the platform */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access for the role */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access for the role */,
  "execute_access" INTEGER /* Execute access for the role */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* The level of permission (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
